	@charId			INT,
	@mapNumber		INT,
	@extraCount		TINYINT,
	@nextResetTime	BIGINT
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON
	IF @mapNumber = 0
		UPDATE user_instance_extracount
		SET next_reset_time = 0
		WHERE char_id = @charId
	ELSE
		IF EXISTS (SELECT map_number FROM user_instance_extracount (UPDLOCK) WHERE char_id = @charId AND map_number = @mapNumber) 
			UPDATE user_instance_extracount
			SET extra_count_abyssop = @extraCount,
				next_reset_time = @nextResetTime
			WHERE char_id = @charId AND map_number = @mapNumber
		ELSE
			INSERT INTO user_instance_extracount VALUES(@charId, @mapNumber, @extraCount, @nextResetTime)

	SET NOCOUNT OFF
END

	@table nvarchar(100),
	@column nvarchar(100),
	@oldName nvarchar(250) output
as 
begin 	
	
	select 
		@oldName = default_constraints.name
	from sys.all_columns
		inner join
		sys.tables on all_columns.object_id = tables.object_id
		inner join 
		sys.schemas on tables.schema_id = schemas.schema_id
		inner join 
		sys.default_constraints on all_columns.default_object_id = default_constraints.object_id
	where schemas.name = 'dbo' and tables.name = @table and all_columns.name = @column			
end

	exec get_constraint_name @table, @column, @oldName output

	exec get_constraint_name @table, @column, @oldName output

end

    @victim_char_id INT,

AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON
    DECLARE @killer_name NVARCHAR(64)

    JOIN user_data ud ON cn.name_id = ud.name_id WHERE ud.char_id = @killer_char_id

END
